# FlowBoard Pricing

## Overview

FlowBoard offers three pricing tiers designed to grow with your team. All plans include unlimited tasks, comments, and file attachments. No hidden fees, no per-project charges. Cancel anytime with no penalties. Annual billing saves 20% on Pro and Enterprise plans.

## Free Tier

Perfect for small teams getting started with project management.

**Price:** $0/month forever

**Includes:**
- Up to 5 team members
- 3 active projects
- Kanban, List, and Timeline views
- 5 GB file storage
- Email support
- iOS and Android mobile apps
- 30-day activity history
- Basic integrations (Slack, Google Drive)

**Limitations:**
- No custom fields
- No automations
- No advanced reporting
- No SSO or enterprise security features

**Best for:** Freelancers, small startups, side projects, or teams evaluating FlowBoard before upgrading.

## Pro Tier

For growing teams that need advanced features and unlimited scale.

**Price:** $12 per user/month (billed monthly) or $10 per user/month (billed annually - save 20%)

**Everything in Free, plus:**
- Unlimited team members
- Unlimited projects
- Custom fields (text, number, date, dropdown, checkboxes)
- Automations (rules, triggers, scheduled actions)
- Advanced reporting and dashboards
- Priority live chat support (9 AM - 6 PM EST, Mon-Fri)
- 1-year activity history
- 100 GB file storage per user
- All integrations (GitHub, GitLab, Figma, Zapier)
- Guest access (read-only external collaborators)
- Project templates library

**Best for:** Professional teams, agencies, growing startups, and departments within larger organizations.

## Enterprise Tier

For large organizations requiring advanced security, compliance, and dedicated support.

**Price:** $29 per user/month (billed monthly) or $24 per user/month (billed annually - save 20%)

**Everything in Pro, plus:**
- Single Sign-On (SAML/SSO) with Okta, Azure AD, OneLogin
- Advanced security: 2FA enforcement, IP allowlisting, session management
- Audit logs (full activity tracking for compliance)
- Data residency options (US, EU, APAC)
- 99.95% uptime SLA with financial credits
- Dedicated Customer Success Manager
- Unlimited file storage
- Custom contract terms and MSA
- Onboarding and training sessions
- Priority phone support with 2-hour response SLA
- Advanced permissions (custom roles, project-level access control)
- SCIM user provisioning

**Best for:** Large enterprises, regulated industries (healthcare, finance), and organizations with strict security/compliance requirements.

**Minimum:** 50 users. Contact sales@flowboard.io for custom pricing.

## Add-Ons

Available for Pro and Enterprise customers:

- **Premium Support:** 24/7 phone and live chat support - $500/month
- **Advanced Analytics Pack:** Custom dashboards, data export API, BigQuery integration - $200/month
- **Jira Migration Service:** We migrate all your Jira projects, workflows, and history - $2,000 one-time fee

## Billing FAQ

### What payment methods do you accept?

All major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover) and ACH bank transfers. Enterprise customers can pay via invoice (net 30 terms). We use Stripe for secure payment processing.

### How does billing work when adding or removing users?

Pro and Enterprise plans are billed per user, prorated to the day. If you add 3 users mid-month, you're charged for the partial month immediately. If you remove users, credits are applied to your next invoice. Free tier users don't affect billing.

### Can I switch between monthly and annual billing?

Yes. You can upgrade from monthly to annual anytime - the remaining monthly balance credits toward your first annual payment. Downgrading from annual to monthly takes effect at your renewal date.

### Do you offer discounts for nonprofits or education?

Yes! Nonprofits and educational institutions receive 40% off Pro or Enterprise plans. Contact sales@flowboard.io with proof of nonprofit status (501c3 documentation) or a .edu email address.

### What happens if I exceed the Free plan limits?

If you hit 5 users or 3 projects on Free, you'll be prompted to upgrade to Pro. Your workspace remains functional, but you won't be able to add new users or projects until you upgrade or remove existing ones.

### Is there a minimum contract for Enterprise?

Yes, Enterprise requires a 1-year minimum commitment with 50+ users. Month-to-month Enterprise plans are available at $35/user/month. Contact our sales team to discuss your needs.

### Can I get a refund?

Pro tier: First 30 days are satisfaction guaranteed - full refund, no questions asked. After 30 days, no refunds, but you can cancel anytime and won't be charged for the next period. Enterprise contracts are non-refundable but can be renegotiated with your CSM.
